---
title: "Metabolic Pathway Analysis - MPA"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{MPA}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

Here is an example of how to run the `read_expression_data` function:

```{r setup}
library(MPA)
file_name <- "test_expr_file.txt"
df = data.frame(cond = c(10,12), ctrl = c(11,20), row.names = c("m1","m2"))
write.table(df, file_name, sep = "\t")

df1 <- read_expression_data(file_name)
df1
```


Let's see the documentation for:
`read_expression_data()`

```{r}
?read_expression_data
```



Show heatmap of my data

```{r}
img1 <- heatmap(as.matrix(df1))
img1

```
